problem_statement: Sample instance for smoke-testing the Stella SWE-bench harness wiring. This record is NOT a scored task — it exercises the parse -> prepare -> invoke -> collect-patch flow of run_swebench.py under --dry-run, where nothing is cloned and no model is called. Replace with SWE-bench-Verified instances (or load them straight from HuggingFace with --dataset) for a real run.
